name: USS Cecil J. Doyle (DE 368)
events: 2 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda with USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR).

3 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda with USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR).

5 Jan 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) participated in A/S exercises (Mark 10 projector technique) off Bermuda with USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR).
6 Feb 1945 HMS Ranee (A/Capt. J.A.W. Tothill, DSC, RN) and USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR) arrived at Cristobal, Panama Canal Zone.
USS Cecil J. Doyle immediately transited the Panama Canal westbound and arrived at Balboa later the same day. (1)

7 Feb 1945 HMS Ranee (A/Capt. J.A.W. Tothill, DSC, RN) transited the Panama Canal westbound. On leaving the Canal USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR) rejoined her and course was set for San Diego, California. (1)
15 Feb 1945 HMS Ranee (A/Capt. J.A.W. Tothill, DSC, RN) and USS Cecil J. Doyle (Lt. W.G. Claytor, Jr., USNR) arrived at San Diego from the Panama Canal Zone. (1)
